content.tip: Make sure your thank you letters go out within 48 hours of receiving a donation. Donors who receive timely acknowledgement are significantly more likely to give again.
Personalise your donor communications wherever possible. Using a donor's first name and referencing their giving history makes them feel valued and increases retention.
Test your donation page on mobile devices regularly. More than half of all online donations are now made on smartphones so a poor mobile experience costs you real money.
Ask your regular givers to upgrade their gift once a year. A simple phone call or personalised letter can increase their monthly contribution significantly over time.
Share a specific story of impact in every donor communication. Donors give to people not organisations so show them exactly who their money is helping.
